message:
feat: major additions to live, logging, layout, and pretty modules

live.rs:
- SharedBuffer test helper with new(), text(), clear() methods
- make_test_console() factory for test isolation
- Comprehensive LiveOptions tests (default and custom configurations)
- Thread-aware tests with Duration and thread imports

logging.rs:
- Rich logging infrastructure expansion
- Handler configurations and formatting

renderables/layout.rs:
- Layout system for terminal UI composition
- Grid and flow arrangements

renderables/pretty.rs:
- Pretty-printing for complex data structures
- Syntax highlighting support

tests/common/mod.rs:
- Shared test utilities

Syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
